scripts.install:all: npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install && npm --prefix admin install
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n SERVER,CLIENT,ADMIN -c cyan,green,magenta "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev" "npm --prefix admin run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix client run build && npm --prefix admin run build
scripts.deploy:vercel: npx vercel deploy --prod --yes --cwd server && npx vercel deploy --prod --yes --cwd client && npx vercel deploy --prod --yes --cwd admin
